text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehe. I accidentally stayed up late watching a
music show. You know, it's way better watching
live than a recording.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Staying up juuust a little bit for the sake of
Umadol research is fine, right? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the upbeat attitude, Smart Falcon seems
extremely sleep deprived...
